   179→local chosen_theme = themes[current_theme_index]
   180→
   181→local function switch_theme()
   182→	current_theme_index = current_theme_index % #themes + 1
   183→	chosen_theme = themes[current_theme_index]
   184→
   185→	-- Save current tag state
   186→	local current_tag = awful.screen.focused().selected_tag
   187→	local current_tag_index = current_tag and current_tag.index or 1
   188→
   189→	-- Show notification before restart

   191→		title = "Theme Changed",
   192→		text = "Switching to " .. chosen_theme .. " theme...",
   193→		timeout = 1,
   194→	})
   195→
   196→	-- Save current theme index and tag to temporary files
   197→	local theme_file = io.open("/tmp/awesome_current_theme", "w")
   198→	if theme_file then
   199→		theme_file:write(current_theme_index)
   200→		theme_file:close()
   201→	end
   202→
   203→	local tag_file = io.open("/tmp/awesome_current_tag", "w")

   209→	-- Create a flag file to indicate this is a theme switch restart

   213→		flag_file:close()

   299→local function set_wallpaper(s)
   300→	if beautiful.wallpaper then
   301→		local wallpaper = beautiful.wallpaper
   302→		-- If wallpaper is a function, call it with the screen
   303→		if type(wallpaper) == "function" then
   304→			wallpaper = wallpaper(s)
   305→		end
   306→		gears.wallpaper.maximized(wallpaper, s, true)
   307→	end
   308→end

   314→-- Restore tag state after restart
   315→local tag_file = io.open("/tmp/awesome_current_tag", "r")
   316→if tag_file then
   317→	local saved_tag_index = tonumber(tag_file:read("*line"))
   318→	if saved_tag_index and saved_tag_index >= 1 and saved_tag_index <= 9 then
   319→		-- Use a timer with longer timeout to ensure everything is initialized
   320→		local restore_timer = gears.timer({ timeout = 1 })
   321→		restore_timer:connect_signal("timeout", function()
   322→			local screen = awful.screen.focused()
   323→			if screen and screen.tags[saved_tag_index] then
   324→				screen.tags[saved_tag_index]:view_only()
   325→				-- Show notification for debugging

   327→					title = "Tag Restored",

   329→					timeout = 2,
   330→				})
   331→			end
   332→			restore_timer:stop()
   333→		end)
   334→		restore_timer:start()
   335→	end
   336→	tag_file:close()

   415→		-- Save current tag state
   416→		local current_tag = awful.screen.focused().selected_tag
   417→		local current_tag_index = current_tag and current_tag.index or 1
   418→
   419→		-- Save current tag to temporary file
   420→		local tag_file = io.open("/tmp/awesome_current_tag", "w")
   421→		if tag_file then
   422→			tag_file:write(current_tag_index)
   423→			tag_file:close()
   424→		end
   425→
   426→		-- Create a flag file to indicate this is a normal restart
   427→		local flag_file = io.open("/tmp/awesome_normal_restart", "w")
   428→		if flag_file then
   429→			flag_file:write("1")
   430→			flag_file:close()
   431→		end
   432→
   433→		-- Restart awesome
   434→		awesome.restart()
   435→	end, { description = "reload awesome", group = "awesome" }),
   436→	awful.key({ MODKEY, "Shift" }, "q", awesome.quit, { description = "quit awesome", group = "awesome" }),
   437→
   438→	awful.key({ MODKEY }, "l", function()
   439→		awful.tag.incmwfact(0.05)
   440→	end, { description = "increase master width factor", group = "layout" }),
   441→	awful.key({ MODKEY }, "h", function()
   442→		awful.tag.incmwfact(-0.05)
   443→	end, { description = "decrease master width factor", group = "layout" }),
   444→	awful.key({ MODKEY, "Shift" }, "h", function()
   445→		awful.tag.incnmaster(1, nil, true)
   446→	end, { description = "increase the number of master clients", group = "layout" }),
   447→	awful.key({ MODKEY, "Shift" }, "l", function()
   448→		awful.tag.incnmaster(-1, nil, true)
   449→	end, { description = "decrease the number of master clients", group = "layout" }),
   450→	awful.key({ MODKEY, "Control" }, "h", function()
   451→		awful.tag.incncol(1, nil, true)
   452→	end, { description = "increase the number of columns", group = "layout" }),
   453→	awful.key({ MODKEY, "Control" }, "l", function()
   454→		awful.tag.incncol(-1, nil, true)
   455→	end, { description = "decrease the number of columns", group = "layout" }),
   456→	awful.key({ MODKEY }, "space", function()
   457→		awful.layout.inc(1)
   458→	end, { description = "select next", group = "layout" }),
   459→	awful.key({ MODKEY, "Shift" }, "space", function()
   460→		awful.layout.inc(-1)
   461→	end, { description = "select previous", group = "layout" }),
   462→
   463→	awful.key({ MODKEY, "Control" }, "n", function()
   464→		local c = awful.client.restore()
   465→		-- Focus restored client
   466→		if c then
   467→			c:emit_signal("request::activate", "key.unminimize", { raise = true })
   468→		end
   469→	end, { description = "restore minimized", group = "client" }),
   470→
   471→	-- Prompt
   472→	awful.key({ MODKEY }, "r", function()
   473→		awful.screen.focused().mypromptbox:run()
   474→	end, { description = "run prompt", group = "launcher" }),
   475→
   476→	awful.key({ MODKEY }, "x", function()
   477→		awful.prompt.run({
   478→			prompt = "Run Lua code: ",
   479→			textbox = awful.screen.focused().mypromptbox.widget,
   480→			exe_callback = awful.util.eval,
   481→			history_path = awful.util.get_cache_dir() .. "/history_eval",
   482→		})
   483→	end, { description = "lua execute prompt", group = "awesome" }),
   484→	-- Menubar
   485→	-- awful.key({ MODKEY }, "o", function() menubar.show() end,
   486→	--           {description = "show the menubar", group = "launcher"}),
   487→	awful.key({ MODKEY }, "p", function()
   488→		awful.util.spawn(string.format("rofi -show drun -modes 'drun,window' -config ~/.config/rofi/config.rasi"))
   489→	end, { description = "launch rofi (drun)", group = "launcher" }),
   490→	awful.key({ MODKEY }, "a", function()
   491→		awful.util.spawn(string.format("rofi -show window -modes 'drun,window' -config ~/.config/rofi/config.rasi"))
   492→	end, { description = "launch rofi (window switcher)", group = "launcher" }),
   493→
   494→	-- Theme switching
   495→	awful.key({ MODKEY }, "t", function()
   496→		switch_theme()
   497→	end, { description = "switch theme", group = "awesome" }),
   498→
   499→	-- awful.key({ MODKEY }, "o", function () scratch.drop("kitty", "bottom", "left", 0.60, 0.60, true, mouse.screen) end),
   500→	-- Custom
   501→	awful.key({ MODKEY }, "o", function()
   502→		awful.spawn("flameshot gui")
   503→	end, { description = "start flameshot", group = "launcher" }),
   504→	awful.key({ "Control", altkey, "Shift" }, "Right", function()
   505→		lain.util.useless_gaps_resize(7)
   506→	end, { description = "increment useless gaps", group = "tag" }),
   507→	awful.key({ "Control", altkey, "Shift" }, "Left", function()
   508→		lain.util.useless_gaps_resize(-7)
   509→	end, { description = "decrement useless gaps", group = "tag" }),
   510→	-- Dynamic tagging
   511→	awful.key({ MODKEY, "Shift" }, "n", function()
   512→		lain.util.add_tag()
   513→	end, { description = "add new tag", group = "tag" }),
   514→	awful.key({ MODKEY, "Shift" }, "r", function()
   515→		lain.util.rename_tag()
   516→	end, { description = "rename tag", group = "tag" }),
   517→	awful.key({ MODKEY, "Shift" }, "Left", function()
   518→		lain.util.move_tag(-1)
   519→	end, { description = "move tag to the left", group = "tag" }),
   520→	awful.key({ MODKEY, "Shift" }, "Right", function()
   521→		lain.util.move_tag(1)
   522→	end, { description = "move tag to the right", group = "tag" }),
   523→	awful.key({ MODKEY, "Shift" }, "d", function()
   524→		lain.util.delete_tag()
   525→	end, { description = "delete tag", group = "tag" }),
   526→
   527→	-- Volume control
   528→	awful.key({ MODKEY, "Shift" }, "=", function()
   529→		awful.spawn("amixer set Master 5%+")
   530→		-- Update volume widget if it exists
   531→		if theme.volume and theme.volume.update then
   532→			theme.volume.update()
   533→		end
   534→	end, { description = "volume up", group = "audio" }),
   535→	awful.key({ MODKEY, "Shift" }, "-", function()
   536→		awful.spawn("amixer set Master 5%-")
   537→		-- Update volume widget if it exists
   538→		if theme.volume and theme.volume.update then
   539→			theme.volume.update()
   540→		end
   541→	end, { description = "volume down", group = "audio" }),
   542→
   543→	-- Music control
   544→	awful.key({ MODKEY, altkey }, "Right", function()
   545→		awful.spawn("playerctl next")
   546→	end, { description = "next track", group = "audio" }),
   547→	awful.key({ MODKEY, altkey }, "Left", function()
   548→		awful.spawn("playerctl previous")
   549→	end, { description = "previous track", group = "audio" }),
   550→	awful.key({ MODKEY, altkey }, "space", function()
   551→		awful.spawn("playerctl play-pause")
   552→	end, { description = "play/pause", group = "audio" })
   553→)
   554→
   555→CLIENTKEYS = gears.table.join(
   556→	awful.key({ altkey, "Shift" }, "m", lain.util.magnify_client, { description = "magnify client", group = "client" }),
   557→	awful.key({ MODKEY }, "f", function(c)
   558→		c.fullscreen = not c.fullscreen
   559→		c:raise()
   560→	end, { description = "toggle fullscreen", group = "client" }),
   561→	awful.key({ MODKEY, "Shift" }, "c", function(c)
   562→		c:kill()
   563→	end, { description = "close", group = "client" }),
   564→	awful.key(
   565→		{ MODKEY, "Control" },
   566→		"space",
   567→		awful.client.floating.toggle,
   568→		{ description = "toggle floating", group = "client" }
   569→	),
   570→	awful.key({ MODKEY, "Control" }, "Return", function(c)
   571→		c:swap(awful.client.getmaster())
   572→	end, { description = "move to master", group = "client" }),
   573→	awful.key({ MODKEY }, "o", function(c)
   574→		c:move_to_screen()
   575→	end, { description = "move to screen", group = "client" }),
   576→	awful.key({ MODKEY, "Shift" }, "y", function(c)
   577→		c.ontop = not c.ontop
   578→	end, { description = "toggle keep on top", group = "client" }),
   579→	awful.key({ MODKEY }, "y", function(c)
   580→		c.sticky = not c.sticky
   581→	end, { description = "toggle sticky", group = "client" }),
   582→	awful.key({ MODKEY }, "n", function(c)
   583→		-- The client currently has the input focus, so it cannot be
   584→		-- minimized, since minimized clients can't have the focus.
   585→		c.minimized = true
   586→	end, { description = "minimize", group = "client" }),
   587→	awful.key({ MODKEY }, "m", function(c)
   588→		c.maximized = not c.maximized
   589→		c:raise()
   590→	end, { description = "(un)maximize", group = "client" }),
   591→	awful.key({ MODKEY, "Control" }, "m", function(c)
   592→		c.maximized_vertical = not c.maximized_vertical
   593→		c:raise()
   594→	end, { description = "(un)maximize vertically", group = "client" }),
   595→	awful.key({ MODKEY, "Shift" }, "m", function(c)
   596→		c.maximized_horizontal = not c.maximized_horizontal
   597→		c:raise()
   598→	end, { description = "(un)maximize horizontally", group = "client" })
   599→)
   600→
   601→-- This should map on the top row of your keyboard, usually 1 to 9.
   602→for i = 1, 9 do
   603→	GLOBALKEYS = gears.table.join(
   604→		GLOBALKEYS,
   605→		-- View tag only.
   606→		awful.key({ MODKEY }, "#" .. i + 9, function()
   607→			screen = awful.screen.focused()
   608→			tag = screen.tags[i]
   609→			if tag then
   610→				tag:view_only()
   611→			end
   612→		end, { description = "view tag #" .. i, group = "tag" }),
   613→		-- Toggle tag display.
   614→		awful.key({ MODKEY, "Control" }, "#" .. i + 9, function()
   615→			screen = awful.screen.focused()
   616→			tag = screen.tags[i]
   617→			if tag then
   618→				awful.tag.viewtoggle(tag)
   619→			end
   620→		end, { description = "toggle tag #" .. i, group = "tag" }),
   621→		-- Move client to tag.
   622→		awful.key({ MODKEY, "Shift" }, "#" .. i + 9, function()
   623→			if client.focus then
   624→				tag = client.focus.screen.tags[i]
   625→				if tag then
   626→					client.focus:move_to_tag(tag)
   627→				end
   628→			end
   629→		end, { description = "move focused client to tag #" .. i, group = "tag" }),
   630→		-- Toggle tag on focused client.
   631→		awful.key({ MODKEY, "Control", "Shift" }, "#" .. i + 9, function()
   632→			if client.focus then
   633→				tag = client.focus.screen.tags[i]
   634→				if tag then
   635→					client.focus:toggle_tag(tag)
   636→				end
   637→			end
   638→		end, { description = "toggle focused client on tag #" .. i, group = "tag" })
   639→	)
   640→end
   641→
   642→local clientbuttons = gears.table.join(
   643→	awful.button({}, 1, function(c)
   644→		c:emit_signal("request::activate", "mouse_click", { raise = true })
   645→	end),
   646→	awful.button({ MODKEY }, 1, function(c)
   647→		c:emit_signal("request::activate", "mouse_click", { raise = true })
   648→		awful.mouse.client.move(c)
   649→	end),
   650→	awful.button({ MODKEY }, 3, function(c)
   651→		c:emit_signal("request::activate", "mouse_click", { raise = true })
   652→		awful.mouse.client.resize(c)
   653→	end)
   654→)
   655→
   656→-- Set keys
   657→root.keys(GLOBALKEYS)
   658→-- }}}
   659→
   660→-- {{{ Rules
   661→-- Rules to apply to new clients (through the "manage" signal).
   662→
   663→-- Function to check the number of displays
   664→-- local function get_screen_count()
   665→-- 	return screen.count()
   666→-- end
   667→--
   668→-- -- Define the rules based on the number of displays
   669→-- local rules = {}
   670→
   671→-- if get_screen_count() == 2 then
   672→-- 	table.insert(rules, { rule = { class = "Brave-browser" }, properties = { screen = 1, tag = "2" } })
   673→-- 	table.insert(rules, { rule = { class = "kitty" }, properties = { screen = 1, tag = "1" } })
   674→-- 	table.insert(rules, { rule = { class = "Postman" }, properties = { screen = 1, tag = "3" } })
   675→-- 	table.insert(rules, { rule = { class = "Slack" }, properties = { screen = 2, tag = "1" } })
   676→-- else
   677→-- table.insert(rules, { rule = { class = "Brave-browser" }, properties = { screen = 1, tag = "2" } })
   678→-- table.insert(rules, { rule = { class = "kitty" }, properties = { screen = 1, tag = "1" } })
   679→-- table.insert(rules, { rule = { class = "Postman" }, properties = { screen = 1, tag = "3" } })
   680→-- table.insert(rules, { rule = { class = "Slack" }, properties = { screen = 1, tag = "4" } })
   681→-- end
   682→
   683→-- Check if this is a theme switch restart or normal restart
   684→local is_theme_switch = io.open("/tmp/awesome_theme_switch", "r") ~= nil
   685→local is_normal_restart = io.open("/tmp/awesome_normal_restart", "r") ~= nil
   686→local is_any_restart = is_theme_switch or is_normal_restart
   687→
   688→awful.rules.rules = {
   689→	-- All clients will match this rule.
   690→	{
   691→		rule = {},
   692→		properties = {
   693→			border_width = beautiful.border_width,
   694→			border_color = beautiful.border_normal,
   695→			focus = awful.client.focus.filter,
   696→			raise = true,
   697→			keys = CLIENTKEYS,
   698→			buttons = clientbuttons,
   699→			screen = awful.screen.preferred,
   700→			placement = awful.placement.no_overlap + awful.placement.no_offscreen,
   701→		},
   702→	},
   703→
   704→	-- Only apply tag rules if this is NOT any kind of restart
   705→	{ rule = { class = "kitty" }, properties = { screen = 1, tag = "1" }, rule_any = { is_any_restart = false } },
   706→	{ rule = { class = "obsidian" }, properties = { screen = 1, tag = "2" }, rule_any = { is_any_restart = false } },
   707→	{
   708→		rule = { class = "Brave-browser" },
   709→		properties = { screen = 1, tag = "3" },
   710→		rule_any = { is_any_restart = false },
   711→	},
   712→	{ rule = { class = "bruno" }, properties = { screen = 1, tag = "4" }, rule_any = { is_any_restart = false } },
   713→	{ rule = { class = "firefox" }, properties = { screen = 1, tag = "5" }, rule_any = { is_any_restart = false } },
   714→	{ rule = { class = "Slack" }, properties = { screen = 1, tag = "6" }, rule_any = { is_any_restart = false } },
   715→
   716→	-- Add titlebars to normal clients and dialogs
   717→	{ rule_any = { type = { "normal", "dialog" } }, properties = { titlebars_enabled = false } },
   718→}
   719→-- }}}
   720→
   721→-- {{{ Signals
   722→-- Signal function to execute when a new client appears.
   723→client.connect_signal("manage", function(c)
   724→	-- Set the windows at the slave,
   725→	-- i.e. put it at the end of others instead of setting it master.
   726→	-- if not awesome.startup then awful.client.setslave(c) end
   727→
   728→	if awesome.startup and not c.size_hints.user_position and not c.size_hints.program_position then
   729→		-- Prevent clients from being unreachable after screen count changes.
   730→		awful.placement.no_offscreen(c)
   731→	end
   732→
   733→	-- Debug: Check if we're restoring a tag and prevent client from changing focus
   734→	local tag_file = io.open("/tmp/awesome_current_tag", "r")
   735→	if tag_file then
   736→		tag_file:close()
   737→		-- Don't focus this client if we're restoring a tag
   738→		c:emit_signal("request::activate", "manage", { raise = false })
   739→	end
   740→end)
   741→
   742→-- Add a titlebar if titlebars_enabled is set to true in the rules.
   743→client.connect_signal("request::titlebars", function(c)
   744→	-- Custom
   745→	if beautiful.titlebar_fun then
   746→		beautiful.titlebar_fun(c)
   747→		return
   748→	end
   749→
   750→	-- buttons for the titlebar
   751→	local buttons = gears.table.join(
   752→		awful.button({}, 1, function()
   753→			c:emit_signal("request::activate", "titlebar", { raise = true })
   754→			awful.mouse.client.move(c)
   755→		end),
   756→		awful.button({}, 3, function()
   757→			c:emit_signal("request::activate", "titlebar", { raise = true })
   758→			awful.mouse.client.resize(c)
   759→		end)
   760→	)
   761→
   762→	awful.titlebar(c):setup({
   763→		{ -- Left
   764→			awful.titlebar.widget.iconwidget(c),
   765→			buttons = buttons,
   766→			layout = wibox.layout.fixed.horizontal,
   767→		},
   768→		{ -- Middle
   769→			-- { -- Title
   770→			--     align  = "center",
   771→			--     widget = awful.titlebar.widget.titlewidget(c)
   772→			-- },
   773→			-- buttons = buttons,
   774→			-- layout = wibox.layout.flex.horizontal,
   775→		},
   776→		{ -- Right
   777→			awful.titlebar.widget.floatingbutton(c),
   778→			awful.titlebar.widget.maximizedbutton(c),
   779→			awful.titlebar.widget.stickybutton(c),
   780→			awful.titlebar.widget.ontopbutton(c),
   781→			awful.titlebar.widget.closebutton(c),
   782→			layout = wibox.layout.fixed.horizontal(),
   783→		},
   784→		layout = wibox.layout.align.horizontal,
   785→	})
   786→end)
   787→
   788→-- Enable sloppy focus, so that focus follows mouse.
   789→client.connect_signal("mouse::enter", function(c)
   790→	c:emit_signal("request::activate", "mouse_enter", { raise = false })
   791→end)
   792→
   793→client.connect_signal("focus", function(c)
   794→	c.border_color = beautiful.border_focus
   795→end)
   796→client.connect_signal("unfocus", function(c)
   797→	c.border_color = beautiful.border_normal
   798→end)
   799→-- }}}
   800→

-- =============================================================================
-- KEYBINDINGS REFERENCE
-- =============================================================================
--
-- [Awesome]
--   MODKEY + s                        show help
--   MODKEY + b                        toggle wibox
--   MODKEY + t                        switch theme  (global — takes priority over client keys)
--   MODKEY + Ctrl + x                 lock screen
--   MODKEY + Ctrl + r                 reload awesome
--   MODKEY + Shift + q                quit awesome
--   MODKEY + r                        run prompt
--   MODKEY + x                        lua execute prompt
--
-- [Launcher]
--   MODKEY + Return                   open terminal
--   MODKEY + p                        rofi (app launcher)
--   MODKEY + a                        rofi (window switcher)
--   MODKEY + o                        flameshot (screenshot)
--
-- [Tags]
--   MODKEY + [1-9]                    view tag
--   MODKEY + Ctrl + [1-9]             toggle tag display
--   MODKEY + Left / Right             previous / next tag
--   MODKEY + Escape                   go back (tag history)
--   MODKEY + Shift + n                add new tag
--   MODKEY + Shift + r                rename tag
--   MODKEY + Shift + d                delete tag
--   MODKEY + Shift + Left / Right     move tag left / right
--
-- [Client - focus & movement]
--   MODKEY + j / k                    focus next / previous client
--   MODKEY + Tab                      focus previous client (history)
--   MODKEY + u                        jump to urgent client
--   MODKEY + Shift + j / k            swap with next / previous client
--   MODKEY + Ctrl + Return            move to master
--   MODKEY + Shift + [1-9]            move client to tag
--   MODKEY + Ctrl + Shift + [1-9]     toggle client on tag
--   MODKEY + Ctrl + j / k             focus next / previous screen
--   MODKEY + o                        move client to screen
--
-- [Client - state]
--   MODKEY + f                        toggle fullscreen
--   MODKEY + m                        toggle maximize
--   MODKEY + Ctrl + m                 toggle maximize vertical
--   MODKEY + Shift + m                toggle maximize horizontal
--   MODKEY + n                        minimize
--   MODKEY + Ctrl + n                 restore minimized
--   MODKEY + Ctrl + space             toggle floating
--   MODKEY + Shift + y                toggle keep on top
--   MODKEY + y                        toggle sticky (show on all tags)
--   MODKEY + Shift + c                close client
--   Alt + Shift + m                   magnify client
--
-- [Layout]
--   MODKEY + space                    next layout
--   MODKEY + Shift + space            previous layout
--   MODKEY + h / l                    decrease / increase master width
--   MODKEY + Shift + h / l            decrease / increase master count
--   MODKEY + Ctrl + h / l             decrease / increase column count
--   Ctrl + Alt + Shift + Left / Right decrement / increment gaps
--
-- [Audio]
--   MODKEY + Shift + =                volume up
--   MODKEY + Shift + -                volume down
--   MODKEY + Alt + space              play / pause
--   MODKEY + Alt + Left / Right       previous / next track
--
-- [Mouse]
--   MODKEY + Mouse1                   move client
--   MODKEY + Mouse3                   resize client
-- =============================================================================

local awesome, client, mouse, screen, tag = awesome, client, mouse, screen, tag
local ipairs, string, os, table, tostring, tonumber, type = ipairs, string, os, table, tostring, tonumber, type
pcall(require, "luarocks.loader")

-- Standard awesome library
local gears = require("gears")
local awful = require("awful")
require("awful.autofocus")
-- Widget and layout library
local wibox = require("wibox")
-- Theme handling library
local beautiful = require("beautiful")
-- Notification library
local naughty = require("naughty")
local menubar = require("menubar")
local hotkeys_popup = require("awful.hotkeys_popup")
-- Enable hotkeys help widget for VIM and other apps
-- when client with a matching name is opened:
require("awful.hotkeys_popup.keys")

-- Load Debian menu entries
-- local debian = require("debian.menu")
local has_fdo, freedesktop = pcall(require, "freedesktop")
local lain = require("lain")
-- local scratch = require("scratch")

-- {{{ Error handling
if awesome.startup_errors then
	naughty.notify({
		preset = naughty.config.presets.critical,
		title = "Oops, there were errors during startup!",
		text = awesome.startup_errors,
	})
end
do
	local in_error = false
	awesome.connect_signal("debug::error", function(err)
		-- Make sure we don't go into an endless error loop
		if in_error then
			return
		end
		in_error = true

		naughty.notify({
			preset = naughty.config.presets.critical,
			title = "Oops, an error happened!",
			text = tostring(err),
		})
		in_error = false
	end)
end

-- {{{ Variable definitions
-- Themes define colours, icons, font and wallpapers.
local themes = {
  "everforest",
	"kitay",
	"cccp",
}
local i3lock_settings = "/home/tymoyato/.config/awesome/i3lock-fancy"
-- Try to read saved theme index from file
local current_theme_index = 1
local theme_file = io.open("/tmp/awesome_current_theme", "r")
if theme_file then
	local saved_index = tonumber(theme_file:read("*line"))
	if saved_index and saved_index >= 1 and saved_index <= #themes then
		current_theme_index = saved_index
	end
	theme_file:close()
end

local chosen_theme = themes[current_theme_index]

local function switch_theme()
	current_theme_index = current_theme_index % #themes + 1
	chosen_theme = themes[current_theme_index]

	-- Save current tag state
	local current_tag = awful.screen.focused().selected_tag
	local current_tag_index = current_tag and current_tag.index or 1

	-- Show notification before restart
	naughty.notify({
		title = "Theme Changed",
		text = "Switching to " .. chosen_theme .. " theme...",
		timeout = 1,
	})

	-- Save current theme index and tag to temporary files
	local theme_file = io.open("/tmp/awesome_current_theme", "w")
	if theme_file then
		theme_file:write(current_theme_index)
		theme_file:close()
	end

	local tag_file = io.open("/tmp/awesome_current_tag", "w")
	if tag_file then
		tag_file:write(current_tag_index)
		tag_file:close()
	end

	-- Create a flag file to indicate this is a theme switch restart
	local flag_file = io.open("/tmp/awesome_theme_switch", "w")
	if flag_file then
		flag_file:write("1")
		flag_file:close()
	end

	-- Restart awesome to apply theme change
	awesome.restart()
end

local theme_path = string.format("%s/.config/awesome/themes/%s/theme.lua", os.getenv("HOME"), chosen_theme)
beautiful.init(theme_path)

-- {{{ Wibar

local function set_wallpaper(s)
	if beautiful.wallpaper then
		local wallpaper = beautiful.wallpaper
		-- If wallpaper is a function, call it with the screen
		if type(wallpaper) == "function" then
			wallpaper = wallpaper(s)
		end
		gears.wallpaper.maximized(wallpaper, s, true)
	end
end

awful.screen.connect_for_each_screen(function(s)
	beautiful.connect(s)
end)

-- Restore tag state after restart
local tag_file = io.open("/tmp/awesome_current_tag", "r")
if tag_file then
	local saved_tag_index = tonumber(tag_file:read("*line"))
	if saved_tag_index and saved_tag_index >= 1 and saved_tag_index <= 9 then
		-- Use a timer with longer timeout to ensure everything is initialized
		local restore_timer = gears.timer({ timeout = 1 })
		restore_timer:connect_signal("timeout", function()
			local screen = awful.screen.focused()
			if screen and screen.tags[saved_tag_index] then
				screen.tags[saved_tag_index]:view_only()
				-- Show notification for debugging
				naughty.notify({
					title = "Tag Restored",
					text = "Restored to tag " .. saved_tag_index,
					timeout = 2,
				})
			end
			restore_timer:stop()
		end)
		restore_timer:start()
	end
	tag_file:close()
	-- Clean up the temporary files
	os.remove("/tmp/awesome_current_tag")
	os.remove("/tmp/awesome_theme_switch")
	os.remove("/tmp/awesome_normal_restart")
end

-- Re-set wallpaper when a screen's geometry changes (e.g. different resolution)
screen.connect_signal("property::geometry", set_wallpaper)

-- This should map on the top row of your keyboard, usually 1 to 9.
for i = 1, 9 do
	GLOBALKEYS = gears.table.join(
		GLOBALKEYS,
		-- View tag only.
		awful.key({ MODKEY }, "#" .. i + 9, function()
			screen = awful.screen.focused()
			tag = screen.tags[i]
			if tag then
				tag:view_only()
			end
		end, { description = "view tag #" .. i, group = "tag" }),
		-- Toggle tag display.
		awful.key({ MODKEY, "Control" }, "#" .. i + 9, function()
			screen = awful.screen.focused()
			tag = screen.tags[i]
			if tag then
				awful.tag.viewtoggle(tag)
			end
		end, { description = "toggle tag #" .. i, group = "tag" }),
		-- Move client to tag.
		awful.key({ MODKEY, "Shift" }, "#" .. i + 9, function()
			if client.focus then
				tag = client.focus.screen.tags[i]
				if tag then
					client.focus:move_to_tag(tag)
				end
			end
		end, { description = "move focused client to tag #" .. i, group = "tag" }),
		-- Toggle tag on focused client.
		awful.key({ MODKEY, "Control", "Shift" }, "#" .. i + 9, function()
			if client.focus then
				tag = client.focus.screen.tags[i]
				if tag then
					client.focus:toggle_tag(tag)
				end
			end
		end, { description = "toggle focused client on tag #" .. i, group = "tag" })
	)
end

}
-- }}}

-- {{{ Signals
-- Signal function to execute when a new client appears.
client.connect_signal("manage", function(c)
	-- Set the windows at the slave,
	-- i.e. put it at the end of others instead of setting it master.
	-- if not awesome.startup then awful.client.setslave(c) end

	if awesome.startup and not c.size_hints.user_position and not c.size_hints.program_position then
		-- Prevent clients from being unreachable after screen count changes.
		awful.placement.no_offscreen(c)
	end

	-- Debug: Check if we're restoring a tag and prevent client from changing focus
	local tag_file = io.open("/tmp/awesome_current_tag", "r")
	if tag_file then
		tag_file:close()
		-- Don't focus this client if we're restoring a tag
		c:emit_signal("request::activate", "manage", { raise = false })
	end
end)

-- Add a titlebar if titlebars_enabled is set to true in the rules.
client.connect_signal("request::titlebars", function(c)
	-- Custom
	if beautiful.titlebar_fun then
		beautiful.titlebar_fun(c)
		return
	end

	-- buttons for the titlebar
	local buttons = gears.table.join(
		awful.button({}, 1, function()
			c:emit_signal("request::activate", "titlebar", { raise = true })
			awful.mouse.client.move(c)
		end),
		awful.button({}, 3, function()
			c:emit_signal("request::activate", "titlebar", { raise = true })
			awful.mouse.client.resize(c)
		end)
	)

	awful.titlebar(c):setup({
		{ -- Left
			awful.titlebar.widget.iconwidget(c),
			buttons = buttons,
			layout = wibox.layout.fixed.horizontal,
		},
		{ -- Middle
			-- { -- Title
			--     align  = "center",
			--     widget = awful.titlebar.widget.titlewidget(c)
			-- },
			-- buttons = buttons,
			-- layout = wibox.layout.flex.horizontal,
		},
		{ -- Right
			awful.titlebar.widget.floatingbutton(c),
			awful.titlebar.widget.maximizedbutton(c),
			awful.titlebar.widget.stickybutton(c),
			awful.titlebar.widget.ontopbutton(c),
			awful.titlebar.widget.closebutton(c),
			layout = wibox.layout.fixed.horizontal(),
		},
		layout = wibox.layout.align.horizontal,
	})
end)

-- Enable sloppy focus, so that focus follows mouse.
client.connect_signal("mouse::enter", function(c)
	c:emit_signal("request::activate", "mouse_enter", { raise = false })
end)

client.connect_signal("focus", function(c)
	c.border_color = beautiful.border_focus
end)
client.connect_signal("unfocus", function(c)
	c.border_color = beautiful.border_normal
end)
-- }}}

local gears = require("gears")
local lain = require("lain")
local awful = require("awful")
local wibox = require("wibox")
local os, math, string = os, math, string

theme = {}
theme.dir = os.getenv("HOME") .. "/.config/awesome/themes/everforest"
theme.wallpaper = "#A7C080" -- Solid color background
theme.font = "Meslo LGS Regular 10"
theme.taglist_font = "Meslo LGS Bold 10"
theme.tasklist_font = "Terminus 10"

-- Everforest color scheme (Dark Medium Contrast)
theme.bg_normal = "#2D353B"     -- bg0
theme.fg_normal = "#D3C6AA"     -- fg
theme.bg_focus = "#425047"      -- bg_green
theme.fg_focus = "#A7C080"      -- green
theme.bg_urgent = "#514045"     -- bg_red
theme.fg_urgent = "#E67E80"     -- red

theme.fg_widget = "#A7C080"     -- green

-- Taglist colors with Everforest theme
theme.taglist_bg_focus = "#425047"      -- bg_green
theme.taglist_fg_focus = "#D3C6AA"      -- fg
theme.taglist_bg_occupied = "#3D484D"   -- bg2
theme.taglist_fg_occupied = "#A7C080"   -- green
theme.taglist_bg_empty = "#475258"      -- bg3
theme.taglist_fg_empty = "#859289"      -- grey1
theme.taglist_bg_urgent = "#514045"     -- bg_red
theme.taglist_fg_urgent = "#E67E80"     -- red
theme.taglist_shape = gears.shape.rounded_rect

-- Tasklist colors
theme.tasklist_bg_normal = "#2D353B"    -- bg0
theme.tasklist_fg_normal = "#D3C6AA"    -- fg
theme.tasklist_bg_focus = "#425047"     -- bg_green
theme.tasklist_fg_focus = "#D3C6AA"     -- fg
theme.tasklist_bg_urgent = "#514045"    -- bg_red
theme.tasklist_fg_urgent = "#E67E80"    -- red

theme.border_width = 0
theme.border_normal = "#3D484D"         -- bg2
theme.border_focus = "#A7C080"          -- green
theme.border_marked = "#E69875"         -- orange

theme.titlebar_bg_normal = "#3D484D"    -- bg2
theme.titlebar_fg_normal = "#D3C6AA"    -- fg

theme.titlebar_bg_focus = "#425047"     -- bg_green
theme.titlebar_fg_focus = "#D3C6AA"     -- fg

theme.menu_height = 16
theme.menu_width = 140

theme.notification_font = "Meslo LGS Regular 12"
theme.notification_bg = theme.bg_normal
theme.notification_fg = theme.fg_normal
theme.notification_border_width = 0
theme.notification_border_color = theme.bg_normal
theme.notification_shape = gears.shape.infobubble
theme.notification_opacity = 1
theme.notification_margin = 30

theme.menu_submenu_icon = theme.dir .. "/icons/submenu.png"

-- Layout icons
theme.layout_tile = theme.dir .. "/icons/layouts/tile.png"
theme.layout_tileleft = theme.dir .. "/icons/layouts/tileleft.png"
theme.layout_tilebottom = theme.dir .. "/icons/layouts/tilebottom.png"
theme.layout_tiletop = theme.dir .. "/icons/layouts/tiletop.png"
theme.layout_fairv = theme.dir .. "/icons/layouts/fairv.png"
theme.layout_fairh = theme.dir .. "/icons/layouts/fairh.png"
theme.layout_spiral = theme.dir .. "/icons/layouts/spiral.png"
theme.layout_centerwork = theme.dir .. "/icons/layouts/centerwork.png"
theme.layout_dwindle = theme.dir .. "/icons/layouts/dwindle.png"
theme.layout_max = theme.dir .. "/icons/layouts/max.png"
theme.layout_fullscreen = theme.dir .. "/icons/layouts/fullscreen.png"
theme.layout_magnifier = theme.dir .. "/icons/layouts/magnifier.png"
theme.layout_floating = theme.dir .. "/icons/layouts/floating.png"

-- Widget icons
theme.widget_music = theme.dir .. "/icons/widgets/note.png"
theme.widget_music_on = theme.dir .. "/icons/widgets/note_on.png"
theme.widget_music_pause = theme.dir .. "/icons/widgets/pause.png"
theme.widget_music_stop = theme.dir .. "/icons/widgets/stop.png"

theme.tasklist_plain_task_name = true
theme.tasklist_disable_icon = true
theme.useless_gap = 6

theme.titlebar_close_button_focus = theme.dir .. "/icons/titlebar/close_focus.png"
theme.titlebar_ontop_button_focus_active = theme.dir .. "/icons/titlebar/ontop_focus_active.png"
theme.titlebar_ontop_button_focus_inactive = theme.dir .. "/icons/titlebar/ontop_focus_inactive.png"
theme.titlebar_sticky_button_focus_active = theme.dir .. "/icons/titlebar/sticky_focus_active.png"
theme.titlebar_sticky_button_focus_inactive = theme.dir .. "/icons/titlebar/sticky_focus_inactive.png"
theme.titlebar_floating_button_focus_active = theme.dir .. "/icons/titlebar/floating_focus_active.png"
theme.titlebar_floating_button_focus_inactive = theme.dir .. "/icons/titlebar/floating_focus_inactive.png"
theme.titlebar_maximized_button_focus_active = theme.dir .. "/icons/titlebar/maximized_focus_active.png"
theme.titlebar_maximized_button_focus_inactive = theme.dir .. "/icons/titlebar/maximized_focus_inactive.png"

-- Everforest colors
theme.green = "#A7C080"         -- green
theme.red = "#E67E80"           -- red
theme.yellow = "#DBBC7F"        -- yellow
theme.blue = "#7FBBB3"          -- blue
theme.orange = "#E69875"        -- orange
theme.purple = "#D699B6"        -- purple
theme.aqua = "#83C092"          -- aqua
theme.grey0 = "#7A8478"         -- grey0
theme.grey1 = "#859289"         -- grey1
theme.grey2 = "#9DA9A0"         -- grey2
theme.bg_dim = "#232A2E"        -- bg_dim
theme.bg_visual = "#543A48"     -- bg_visual
theme.black = theme.bg_normal

-- Panel
local markup = lain.util.markup

-- Widgets --
local clock_widget = require("themes.everforest.widgets_config.clock_widget")
local battery_widget = require("themes.everforest.widgets_config.battery_widget")
local mem_widget = require("themes.everforest.widgets_config.mem_widget")
local cpu_widget = require("themes.everforest.widgets_config.cpu_widget")
local temp_widget = require("themes.everforest.widgets_config.temp_widget")
local volume_widget = require("themes.everforest.widgets_config.volume_widget")
local kbd_widget = require("widgets.kbd_widget.kbd_widget")
local brightness_widget = require("themes.everforest.widgets_config.brightness_widget")
local music_widget = require("themes.everforest.widgets_config.music_widget")
local crypto_widget = require("themes.everforest.widgets_config.crypto_widget")

function theme.connect(s)
    -- Quake application
    s.quake = lain.util.quake({ app = awful.util.terminal })

    -- Set solid color wallpaper
    gears.wallpaper.set(theme.wallpaper)

    -- Tags
    layout = {
        awful.layout.layouts[1],
        awful.layout.layouts[1],
        awful.layout.layouts[1],
        awful.layout.layouts[3],
        awful.layout.layouts[3],
        awful.layout.layouts[5],
    }
    awful.tag({ "1", "2", "3", "4", "5", "6", "7", "8", "9" }, s, layout)

    -- Promptbox
    s.mypromptbox = awful.widget.prompt()

    -- Layoutbox
    s.mylayoutbox = awful.widget.layoutbox(s)
    s.mylayoutbox:buttons(awful.util.table.join(
        awful.button({}, 1, function() awful.layout.inc(1) end),
        awful.button({}, 3, function() awful.layout.inc(-1) end),
        awful.button({}, 4, function() awful.layout.inc(1) end),
        awful.button({}, 5, function() awful.layout.inc(-1) end)
    ))

    -- Taglist
    s.mytaglist = awful.widget.taglist(s, awful.widget.taglist.filter.all, awful.util.taglist_buttons)

    -- Wibar
    s.mywibox = awful.wibar({ position = "top", screen = s, height = 16, bg = "#00000000", fg = theme.fg_focus })
    local net_speed_widget = require("widgets.net_speed_widget.net_speed")

    -- Setup
    s.mywibox:setup({
        layout = wibox.layout.align.horizontal,
        { -- Left
            layout = wibox.layout.fixed.horizontal,
            s.mytaglist,
            s.mypromptbox,
        },
        { -- Middle (empty for now)
            layout = wibox.layout.fixed.horizontal,
        },
        { -- Right
            layout = wibox.layout.fixed.horizontal,
            music_widget,
            wibox.widget.textbox(" "),
            wibox.container.background(
                wibox.container.margin(net_speed_widget(), 2, 2),
                "#425047",
                gears.shape.rounded_rect
            ),
            wibox.widget.textbox(" "),
            kbd_widget,
            wibox.widget.textbox(" "),
            brightness_widget,
            wibox.widget.textbox(" "),
            volume_widget,
            wibox.widget.textbox(" "),
            temp_widget,
            wibox.widget.textbox(" "),
            cpu_widget,
            wibox.widget.textbox(" "),
            mem_widget,
            wibox.widget.textbox(" "),
            battery_widget,
            wibox.widget.textbox(" "),
            crypto_widget,
            wibox.widget.textbox(" "),
            clock_widget,
            wibox.widget.textbox(" "),
            s.mylayoutbox,
        },
    })
end

return theme

content.content:
1→-- CPU
     2→local wibox = require("wibox")
     3→local lain = require("lain")
     4→local markup = lain.util.markup
     5→local gears = require("gears")
     6→
     7→theme.widget_cpu = theme.dir .. "/icons/widgets/cpu.png"
     8→local cpu_icon = wibox.widget.imagebox(theme.widget_cpu)
     9→local cpu = lain.widget.cpu({
    10→	settings = function()
    11→		widget:set_markup(markup.font(theme.font, markup.fg.color(theme.fg_widget, " " .. cpu_now.usage .. "% ")))
    12→	end,
    13→})
    14→local cpu_widget = wibox.container.background(
    15→	wibox.container.margin(wibox.widget({ cpu_icon, cpu.widget, layout = wibox.layout.align.horizontal }), 2, 2),
    16→	"#00b894",
    17→	gears.shape.rounded_rect
    18→)
    19→
    20→return cpu_widget
    21→

-- CPU
local wibox = require("wibox")
local lain = require("lain")
local markup = lain.util.markup
local gears = require("gears")

theme.widget_cpu = theme.dir .. "/icons/widgets/cpu.png"
local cpu_icon = wibox.widget.imagebox(theme.widget_cpu)
local cpu = lain.widget.cpu({
	settings = function()
		widget:set_markup(markup.font(theme.font, markup.fg.color(theme.fg_widget, " " .. cpu_now.usage .. "% ")))
	end,
})
local cpu_widget = wibox.container.background(
	wibox.container.margin(wibox.widget({ cpu_icon, cpu.widget, layout = wibox.layout.align.horizontal }), 2, 2),
	"#00b894",
	gears.shape.rounded_rect
)

return cpu_widget

-- Crypto prices (BTC + ETH in EUR)
local wibox = require("wibox")
local watch = require("awful.widget.watch")
local gears = require("gears")
local lain = require("lain")
local markup = lain.util.markup

local crypto_text = wibox.widget.textbox()

local function format_price(price)
    local n = tonumber(price)
    if not n then return "?" end
    if n >= 1000 then
        return string.format("%.1fk", n / 1000)
    end
    return string.format("%d", math.floor(n))
end

watch(
    "curl -s --max-time 10 'https://api.coingecko.com/api/v3/simple/price?ids=bitcoin,ethereum&vs_currencies=eur'",
    300,
    function(widget, stdout)
        local btc = stdout:match('"bitcoin"%s*:%s*{%s*"eur"%s*:%s*([%d%.]+)')
        local eth = stdout:match('"ethereum"%s*:%s*{%s*"eur"%s*:%s*([%d%.]+)')
        local text
        if btc and eth then
            text = markup.fg.color(theme.fg_normal,
                " ₿" .. format_price(btc) .. "  Ξ" .. format_price(eth) .. " ")
        else
            text = markup.fg.color(theme.fg_normal, " ₿?  Ξ? ")
        end
        widget:set_markup(markup.font(theme.font, text))
    end,
    crypto_text
)

local crypto_widget = wibox.container.background(
    wibox.container.margin(crypto_text, 2, 2),
    "#425047",
    gears.shape.rounded_rect
)

return crypto_widget

file.content:
-------------------------------------------------
-- Net Speed Widget for Awesome Window Manager
-- Shows current upload/download speed
-- More details could be found here:
-- https://github.com/streetturtle/awesome-wm-widgets/tree/master/net-speed-widget

-- @author Pavel Makhov
-- @copyright 2020 Pavel Makhov
-------------------------------------------------

local watch = require("awful.widget.watch")
local wibox = require("wibox")
local beautiful = require("beautiful")
local markup = require("lain.util.markup")

local HOME_DIR = os.getenv("HOME")
local WIDGET_DIR = HOME_DIR .. "/.config/awesome/widgets/net_speed_widget/"
local ICONS_DIR = WIDGET_DIR .. "icons/"

local net_speed_widget = {}

local function convert_to_h(bytes)
	local speed
	local dim
	local bits = bytes * 8
	if bits < 1000 then
		speed = bits
		dim = "b/s"
	elseif bits < 1000000 then
		speed = bits / 1000
		dim = "kb/s"
	elseif bits < 1000000000 then
		speed = bits / 1000000
		dim = "Mb/s"
	elseif bits < 1000000000000 then
		speed = bits / 1000000000
		dim = "Gb/s"
	else
		speed = tonumber(bits)
		dim = "b/s"
	end
	return math.floor(speed + 0.5) .. " " .. dim
end

local function split(string_to_split, separator)
	if separator == nil then
		separator = "%s"
	end
	local t = {}

	for str in string.gmatch(string_to_split, "([^" .. separator .. "]+)") do
		table.insert(t, str)
	end

	return t
end

local function worker(user_args)
	local args = user_args or {}

	local interface = args.interface or "*"
	local timeout = args.timeout or 2
	local width = args.width or 55

	net_speed_widget = wibox.widget({
		{
			id = "rx_speed",
			forced_width = width,
			align = "right",
			widget = wibox.widget.textbox,
			bg = "#FFFF00",
		},
		{
			image = ICONS_DIR .. "down.svg",
			widget = wibox.widget.imagebox,
			bg = "#FFFF00",
		},
		{
			image = ICONS_DIR .. "up.svg",
			widget = wibox.widget.imagebox,
			bg = "#FFFF00",
		},
		{
			id = "tx_speed",
			forced_width = width,
			align = "left",
			widget = wibox.widget.textbox,
			bg = "#FFFF00",
		},
		layout = wibox.layout.fixed.horizontal,
		set_rx_text = function(self, new_rx_speed)
			self:get_children_by_id("rx_speed")[1]:set_markup(markup.font(beautiful.font, markup.fg.color(beautiful.fg_normal, tostring(new_rx_speed))))
		end,
		set_tx_text = function(self, new_tx_speed)
			self:get_children_by_id("tx_speed")[1]:set_markup(markup.font(beautiful.font, markup.fg.color(beautiful.fg_normal, tostring(new_tx_speed))))
		end,
	})

	-- make sure these are not shared across different worker/widgets (e.g. two monitors)
	-- otherwise the speed will be randomly split among the worker in each monitor
	local prev_rx = 0
	local prev_tx = 0

	local update_widget = function(widget, stdout)
		local cur_vals = split(stdout, "\r\n")

		local cur_rx = 0
		local cur_tx = 0

		for i, v in ipairs(cur_vals) do
			if i % 2 == 1 then
				cur_rx = cur_rx + v
			end
			if i % 2 == 0 then
				cur_tx = cur_tx + v
			end
		end

		local speed_rx = (cur_rx - prev_rx) / timeout
		local speed_tx = (cur_tx - prev_tx) / timeout

		widget:set_rx_text(convert_to_h(speed_rx))
		widget:set_tx_text(convert_to_h(speed_tx))

		prev_rx = cur_rx
		prev_tx = cur_tx
	end

	watch(
		string.format([[bash -c "cat /sys/class/net/%s/statistics/*_bytes"]], interface),
		timeout,
		update_widget,
		net_speed_widget
	)

	return net_speed_widget
end

return setmetatable(net_speed_widget, {
	__call = function(_, ...)
		return worker(...)
	end,
})

1→-- Music widget using playerctl (for browser/Spotify/etc)
     2→local wibox = require("wibox")
     3→local awful = require("awful")
     4→local markup = require("lain.util.markup")
     5→local gears = require("gears")
     6→
     7→local music_text = wibox.widget.textbox()
     8→music_text.align = "center"
     9→music_text.forced_width = 24
    10→local album_art = wibox.widget.imagebox()
    11→
    12→local text_scroll = wibox.container.scroll.horizontal(music_text, 40)
    13→local text_area = wibox.container.constraint(text_scroll, "exact", 24, nil)
    14→
    15→-- Create control buttons
    16→local prev_button = wibox.widget.textbox()
    17→local next_button = wibox.widget.textbox()
    18→
    19→-- Set initial button text with everforest colors
    20→prev_button:set_markup(markup.font(theme.font, markup.fg.color("#A7C080", "⏮")))
    21→next_button:set_markup(markup.font(theme.font, markup.fg.color("#A7C080", "⏭")))
    22→
    23→-- Set initial state: collapsed with music note
    24→prev_button.visible = false
    25→next_button.visible = false
    26→music_text:set_markup(markup.font(theme.font, markup.fg.color("#D3C6AA", "♪")))
    27→
    28→local function update_music()
    29→	-- Query all players, get the first one that is Playing or Paused
    30→	awful.spawn.easy_async_with_shell(
    31→		[[playerctl -a metadata --format '{{status}}|||{{artist}}|||{{title}}|||{{xesam:url}}|||{{mpris:artUrl}}' 2>/dev/null | grep -m1 '^Playing\|^Paused']],
    32→		function(stdout)
    33→			stdout = stdout:gsub("\n", ""):gsub("\r", ""):gsub("^%s*(.-)%s*$", "%1")
    34→
    35→			if stdout == "" then
    36→				album_art:set_image(nil)
    37→				prev_button.visible = false
    38→				next_button.visible = false
    39→				text_area.width = 24
    40→				music_text.forced_width = 24
    41→				music_text.align = "center"
    42→				music_text:set_markup(markup.font(theme.font, markup.fg.color("#859289", "♪")))
    43→				return
    44→			end
    45→
    46→			local artist, title, url, art_url = stdout:match("^[^|]+|||(.-)|||(.-)|||(.-)|||(.-)$")
    47→			artist = artist or ""
    48→			title = title or ""
    49→			url = url or ""
    50→			art_url = art_url or ""
    51→
    52→			-- Fallback to filename from URL if title is empty
    53→			if title == "" and url ~= "" then
    54→				title = url:match("([^/]+)$") or url
    55→				title = title:gsub("%%(%x%x)", function(h) return string.char(tonumber(h, 16)) end)
    56→				title = title:gsub("%.[^%.]+$", "")
    57→			end
    58→
    59→			local song
    60→			if artist ~= "" and title ~= "" then
    61→				song = artist .. " - " .. title
    62→			elseif title ~= "" then
    63→				song = title
    64→			else
    65→				song = ""
    66→			end
    67→
    68→			if song ~= "" and string.len(song) > 3 then
    69→				prev_button.visible = true
    70→				next_button.visible = true
    71→				text_area.width = 150
    72→				music_text.forced_width = nil
    73→				music_text.align = "left"
    74→				if art_url ~= "" and art_url ~= "file://" then
    75→					album_art:set_image(art_url:gsub("file://", ""))
    76→				else
    77→					album_art:set_image(nil)
    78→				end
    79→				local display = song:gsub("&", "&"):gsub("<", "<"):gsub(">", ">")
    80→				music_text:set_markup(markup.font(theme.font, markup.fg.color("#D3C6AA", " " .. display .. " ")))
    81→			else
    82→				album_art:set_image(nil)
    83→				prev_button.visible = false
    84→				next_button.visible = false
    85→				text_area.width = 24
    86→				music_text.forced_width = 24
    87→				music_text.align = "center"
    88→				music_text:set_markup(markup.font(theme.font, markup.fg.color("#859289", "♪")))
    89→			end
    90→		end
    91→	)
    92→end
    93→
    94→local music_widget = wibox.container.background(
    95→	wibox.container.margin(
    96→		wibox.widget({
    97→			-- Left side with prev button
    98→			{
    99→				prev_button,
   100→				layout = wibox.layout.fixed.horizontal,
   101→			},
   102→			-- Center with album art and scrolling music text
   103→			{
   104→				album_art,
   105→				text_area,
   106→				layout = wibox.layout.fixed.horizontal,
   107→			},
   108→			-- Right side with next button
   109→			{
   110→				next_button,
   111→				layout = wibox.layout.fixed.horizontal,
   112→			},
   113→			layout = wibox.layout.align.horizontal,
   114→		}),
   115→		2,
   116→		4
   117→	),
   118→	"#425047",
   119→	gears.shape.rounded_rect
   120→)
   121→
   122→-- Make buttons clickable
   123→prev_button:buttons(awful.util.table.join(awful.button({}, 1, function()
   124→	awful.spawn("playerctl previous")
   125→	-- Add a small delay before updating to allow the player to change
   126→	gears.timer.delayed_call(function()
   127→		update_music()
   128→	end)
   129→end)))
   130→
   131→next_button:buttons(awful.util.table.join(awful.button({}, 1, function()
   132→	awful.spawn("playerctl next")
   133→	-- Add a small delay before updating to allow the player to change
   134→	gears.timer.delayed_call(function()
   135→		update_music()
   136→	end)
   137→end)))
   138→
   139→-- Make music text clickable for play/pause
   140→local function toggle_play_pause()
   141→	awful.spawn("playerctl play-pause")
   142→	gears.timer.delayed_call(function()
   143→		update_music()
   144→	end)
   145→end
   146→music_text:buttons(awful.util.table.join(awful.button({}, 1, toggle_play_pause)))
   147→text_scroll:buttons(awful.util.table.join(awful.button({}, 1, toggle_play_pause)))
   148→
   149→-- Initial update
   150→update_music()
   151→
   152→-- Update every 2 seconds
   153→local timer = gears.timer({ timeout = 2 })
   154→timer:connect_signal("timeout", update_music)
   155→timer:start()
   156→
   157→return music_widget
   158→

-- Music widget using playerctl (for browser/Spotify/etc)
local wibox = require("wibox")
local awful = require("awful")
local markup = require("lain.util.markup")
local gears = require("gears")

local music_text = wibox.widget.textbox()
music_text.align = "center"
music_text.forced_width = 24
local album_art = wibox.widget.imagebox()

local text_scroll = wibox.container.scroll.horizontal(music_text, 40)
local text_area = wibox.container.constraint(text_scroll, "exact", 24, nil)

-- Create control buttons
local prev_button = wibox.widget.textbox()
local next_button = wibox.widget.textbox()

-- Set initial button text with everforest colors
prev_button:set_markup(markup.font(theme.font, markup.fg.color("#A7C080", "⏮")))
next_button:set_markup(markup.font(theme.font, markup.fg.color("#A7C080", "⏭")))

-- Set initial state: collapsed with music note
prev_button.visible = false
next_button.visible = false
music_text:set_markup(markup.font(theme.font, markup.fg.color("#D3C6AA", "♪")))

local function update_music()
	-- Query all players, get the first one that is Playing or Paused
	awful.spawn.easy_async_with_shell(
		[[playerctl -a metadata --format '{{status}}|||{{artist}}|||{{title}}|||{{xesam:url}}|||{{mpris:artUrl}}' 2>/dev/null | grep -m1 '^Playing\|^Paused']],
		function(stdout)
			stdout = stdout:gsub("\n", ""):gsub("\r", ""):gsub("^%s*(.-)%s*$", "%1")

			if stdout == "" then
				album_art:set_image(nil)
				prev_button.visible = false
				next_button.visible = false
				text_area.width = 24
				music_text.forced_width = 24
				music_text.align = "center"
				music_text:set_markup(markup.font(theme.font, markup.fg.color("#859289", "♪")))
				return
			end

			local artist, title, url, art_url = stdout:match("^[^|]+|||(.-)|||(.-)|||(.-)|||(.-)$")
			artist = artist or ""
			title = title or ""
			url = url or ""
			art_url = art_url or ""

			-- Fallback to filename from URL if title is empty
			if title == "" and url ~= "" then
				title = url:match("([^/]+)$") or url
				title = title:gsub("%%(%x%x)", function(h) return string.char(tonumber(h, 16)) end)
				title = title:gsub("%.[^%.]+$", "")
			end

			local song
			if artist ~= "" and title ~= "" then
				song = artist .. " - " .. title
			elseif title ~= "" then
				song = title
			else
				song = ""
			end

			if song ~= "" and string.len(song) > 3 then
				prev_button.visible = true
				next_button.visible = true
				text_area.width = 150
				music_text.forced_width = nil
				music_text.align = "left"
				if art_url ~= "" and art_url ~= "file://" then
					album_art:set_image(art_url:gsub("file://", ""))
				else
					album_art:set_image(nil)
				end
				local display = song:gsub("&", "&"):gsub("<", "<"):gsub(">", ">")
				music_text:set_markup(markup.font(theme.font, markup.fg.color("#D3C6AA", " " .. display .. " ")))
			else
				album_art:set_image(nil)
				prev_button.visible = false
				next_button.visible = false
				text_area.width = 24
				music_text.forced_width = 24
				music_text.align = "center"
				music_text:set_markup(markup.font(theme.font, markup.fg.color("#859289", "♪")))
			end
		end
	)
end

local music_widget = wibox.container.background(
	wibox.container.margin(
		wibox.widget({
			-- Left side with prev button
			{
				prev_button,
				layout = wibox.layout.fixed.horizontal,
			},
			-- Center with album art and scrolling music text
			{
				album_art,
				text_area,
				layout = wibox.layout.fixed.horizontal,
			},
			-- Right side with next button
			{
				next_button,
				layout = wibox.layout.fixed.horizontal,
			},
			layout = wibox.layout.align.horizontal,
		}),
		2,
		4
	),
	"#425047",
	gears.shape.rounded_rect
)

-- Make buttons clickable
prev_button:buttons(awful.util.table.join(awful.button({}, 1, function()
	awful.spawn("playerctl previous")
	-- Add a small delay before updating to allow the player to change
	gears.timer.delayed_call(function()
		update_music()
	end)
end)))

next_button:buttons(awful.util.table.join(awful.button({}, 1, function()
	awful.spawn("playerctl next")
	-- Add a small delay before updating to allow the player to change
	gears.timer.delayed_call(function()
		update_music()
	end)
end)))

-- Make music text clickable for play/pause
local function toggle_play_pause()
	awful.spawn("playerctl play-pause")
	gears.timer.delayed_call(function()
		update_music()
	end)
end
music_text:buttons(awful.util.table.join(awful.button({}, 1, toggle_play_pause)))
text_scroll:buttons(awful.util.table.join(awful.button({}, 1, toggle_play_pause)))

-- Initial update
update_music()

-- Update every 2 seconds
local timer = gears.timer({ timeout = 2 })
timer:connect_signal("timeout", update_music)
timer:start()

return music_widget

-- Coretemp (lain, average)
local awful = require("awful")
local wibox = require("wibox")
local gears = require("gears")
local lain = require("lain")
local markup = lain.util.markup

-- Function to auto-detect the first available temp*_input file
local function find_temp_file()
    local command = [[
        for hwmon in /sys/class/hwmon/hwmon*; do
            for temp in "$hwmon"/temp*_input; do
                if [ -f "$temp" ]; then
                    echo "$temp"
                    exit 0
                fi
            done
        done
    ]]

    -- Use awful.spawn.easy_async_with_shell for async shell command
    local handle = io.popen(command)
    if handle then
        local result = handle:read("*l")  -- Only read the first line
        handle:close()
        return result or nil
    else
        return nil
    end
end

-- Get temperature file path
local temp_file = find_temp_file() or "/dev/null"

-- Create the widget
theme.widget_temp = theme.dir .. "/icons/widgets/temp.png"
local temp_icon = wibox.widget.imagebox(theme.widget_temp)

local temp = lain.widget.temp({
    tempfiles = { temp_file },
    settings = function()
        local temp_str = "N/A"
        if CORETEMP_NOW ~= "N/A" then
            temp_str = string.format("%.0f", CORETEMP_NOW)
        end
        WIDGET:set_markup(
            markup.font(theme.font, markup.fg.color("#D3C6AA", " " .. temp_str .. "° "))
        )
    end,
})

local temp_widget = wibox.container.background(
    wibox.container.margin(
        wibox.widget({ temp_icon, temp.widget, layout = wibox.layout.align.horizontal }),
        2, 2
    ),
    "#425047",
    gears.shape.rounded_rect
)

return temp_widget

content.text:
Now I have a clear picture of the config. Here are the main performance issues:

1. **Music widget** polls `playerctl -a metadata` (spawns shell) every **2 seconds**
2. **CPU/mem/temp** lain widgets all poll at 2s default
3. **`manage` signal** opens a file on **every new window** (wasteful - file is already deleted after startup)
4. **picom** spawns a new instance on every awesome restart (can stack)
5. **Debug notification** "Tag Restored" fires on every restart

Let me fix these:

-- Music widget using playerctl (for browser/Spotify/etc)
local wibox = require("wibox")
local awful = require("awful")
local markup = require("lain.util.markup")
local gears = require("gears")

local music_text = wibox.widget.textbox()
music_text.align = "center"
music_text.forced_width = 24
local album_art = wibox.widget.imagebox()

local text_scroll = wibox.container.scroll.horizontal(music_text, 40)
local text_area = wibox.container.constraint(text_scroll, "exact", 24, nil)

-- Create control buttons
local prev_button = wibox.widget.textbox()
local next_button = wibox.widget.textbox()

-- Set initial button text with everforest colors
prev_button:set_markup(markup.font(theme.font, markup.fg.color("#A7C080", "⏮")))
next_button:set_markup(markup.font(theme.font, markup.fg.color("#A7C080", "⏭")))

-- Set initial state: collapsed with music note
prev_button.visible = false
next_button.visible = false
music_text:set_markup(markup.font(theme.font, markup.fg.color("#D3C6AA", "♪")))

local function update_music()
	-- Query all players, get the first one that is Playing or Paused
	awful.spawn.easy_async_with_shell(
		[[playerctl -a metadata --format '{{status}}|||{{artist}}|||{{title}}|||{{xesam:url}}|||{{mpris:artUrl}}' 2>/dev/null | grep -m1 '^Playing\|^Paused']],
		function(stdout)
			stdout = stdout:gsub("\n", ""):gsub("\r", ""):gsub("^%s*(.-)%s*$", "%1")

			if stdout == "" then
				album_art:set_image(nil)
				prev_button.visible = false
				next_button.visible = false
				text_area.width = 24
				music_text.forced_width = 24
				music_text.align = "center"
				music_text:set_markup(markup.font(theme.font, markup.fg.color("#859289", "♪")))
				return
			end

			local artist, title, url, art_url = stdout:match("^[^|]+|||(.-)|||(.-)|||(.-)|||(.-)$")
			artist = artist or ""
			title = title or ""
			url = url or ""
			art_url = art_url or ""

			-- Fallback to filename from URL if title is empty
			if title == "" and url ~= "" then
				title = url:match("([^/]+)$") or url
				title = title:gsub("%%(%x%x)", function(h) return string.char(tonumber(h, 16)) end)
				title = title:gsub("%.[^%.]+$", "")
			end

			local song
			if artist ~= "" and title ~= "" then
				song = artist .. " - " .. title
			elseif title ~= "" then
				song = title
			else
				song = ""
			end

			if song ~= "" and string.len(song) > 3 then
				prev_button.visible = true
				next_button.visible = true
				text_area.width = 150
				music_text.forced_width = nil
				music_text.align = "left"
				if art_url ~= "" and art_url ~= "file://" then
					album_art:set_image(art_url:gsub("file://", ""))
				else
					album_art:set_image(nil)
				end
				local display = song:gsub("&", "&"):gsub("<", "<"):gsub(">", ">")
				music_text:set_markup(markup.font(theme.font, markup.fg.color("#D3C6AA", " " .. display .. " ")))
			else
				album_art:set_image(nil)
				prev_button.visible = false
				next_button.visible = false
				text_area.width = 24
				music_text.forced_width = 24
				music_text.align = "center"
				music_text:set_markup(markup.font(theme.font, markup.fg.color("#859289", "♪")))
			end
		end
	)
end

local music_widget = wibox.container.background(
	wibox.container.margin(
		wibox.widget({
			-- Left side with prev button
			{
				prev_button,
				layout = wibox.layout.fixed.horizontal,
			},
			-- Center with album art and scrolling music text
			{
				album_art,
				text_area,
				layout = wibox.layout.fixed.horizontal,
			},
			-- Right side with next button
			{
				next_button,
				layout = wibox.layout.fixed.horizontal,
			},
			layout = wibox.layout.align.horizontal,
		}),
		2,
		4
	),
	"#425047",
	gears.shape.rounded_rect
)

-- Make buttons clickable
prev_button:buttons(awful.util.table.join(awful.button({}, 1, function()
	awful.spawn("playerctl previous")
	-- Add a small delay before updating to allow the player to change
	gears.timer.delayed_call(function()
		update_music()
	end)
end)))

next_button:buttons(awful.util.table.join(awful.button({}, 1, function()
	awful.spawn("playerctl next")
	-- Add a small delay before updating to allow the player to change
	gears.timer.delayed_call(function()
		update_music()
	end)
end)))

-- Make music text clickable for play/pause
local function toggle_play_pause()
	awful.spawn("playerctl play-pause")
	gears.timer.delayed_call(function()
		update_music()
	end)
end
music_text:buttons(awful.util.table.join(awful.button({}, 1, toggle_play_pause)))
text_scroll:buttons(awful.util.table.join(awful.button({}, 1, toggle_play_pause)))

-- Initial update
update_music()

-- Update every 2 seconds
local timer = gears.timer({ timeout = 2 })
timer:connect_signal("timeout", update_music)
timer:start()

return music_widget

toolUseResult.originalFile:
-- Coretemp (lain, average)
local awful = require("awful")
local wibox = require("wibox")
local gears = require("gears")
local lain = require("lain")
local markup = lain.util.markup

-- Function to auto-detect the first available temp*_input file
local function find_temp_file()
    local command = [[
        for hwmon in /sys/class/hwmon/hwmon*; do
            for temp in "$hwmon"/temp*_input; do
                if [ -f "$temp" ]; then
                    echo "$temp"
                    exit 0
                fi
            done
        done
    ]]

    -- Use awful.spawn.easy_async_with_shell for async shell command
    local handle = io.popen(command)
    if handle then
        local result = handle:read("*l")  -- Only read the first line
        handle:close()
        return result or nil
    else
        return nil
    end
end

-- Get temperature file path
local temp_file = find_temp_file() or "/dev/null"

-- Create the widget
theme.widget_temp = theme.dir .. "/icons/widgets/temp.png"
local temp_icon = wibox.widget.imagebox(theme.widget_temp)

local temp = lain.widget.temp({
    tempfiles = { temp_file },
    settings = function()
        local temp_str = "N/A"
        if CORETEMP_NOW ~= "N/A" then
            temp_str = string.format("%.0f", CORETEMP_NOW)
        end
        WIDGET:set_markup(
            markup.font(theme.font, markup.fg.color("#D3C6AA", " " .. temp_str .. "° "))
        )
    end,
})

local temp_widget = wibox.container.background(
    wibox.container.margin(
        wibox.widget({ temp_icon, temp.widget, layout = wibox.layout.align.horizontal }),
        2, 2
    ),
    "#425047",
    gears.shape.rounded_rect
)

return temp_widget
